name: Oven-Roasted Sweet Potato Slices with Orange & Fresh Thyme
recipeIngredient: 1 garlic clove, crushed through a press
1/2 teaspoon fresh thyme leaves (or 1/4 teaspoon dried thyme)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Select a large nonstick sheet pan at least 14 by 10 inches.
3. Cut the sweet potatoes into 1/8 inch, thick slices.
4. Combine the sweet potato slices with the garlic and the oil in a large bowl; toss to coat with the oil.
5. Bake, turning the potatoes once or twice as they begin to brown, about 40 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven. Meanwhile, finely chop the parsley, thyme, and orange zest together; sprinkle over the potatoes.
7. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
8. Return to the oven and bake for 10 minutes longer, or until the potatoes are tender, turning them once.
9. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
